calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-19-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2025 Continued To Apr-16-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-08-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for default judgment against Defendant Capital Homes Investments, LLC.

Dept.505: Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Bailiffs: Deputy Gomez and Deputy Jones; Proceedings reported by "For the Record", commencing at 10:44:21 a.m., pausing at 10:51:38 a.m., resuming at 10:58:13 a.m. and concluding at 11:07:09 a.m. (D505)

Jacob Yoneda, Esq. representing Plaintiff Cielos Abiertos, LLC and Norberto Carlini via Zoom Video Conference.
Plaintiff Norberto Carlini, was placed under oath and testified via Zoom video Conference. Plaintiff is assisted by Spanish speaking interpreter Cynthia Garcia; #324925.
Defendant Capital Homes Investments, LLC. not appearing.

Complaint filed May-14-2024.
Proof of service as to Defendants filed on May-17-2024.
Default entered on June-26-2024.

Counsel to provide a summary in support of the request for judgment.
Court examines Plaintiff. Plaintiff testifies.

Counsel orally moves the court for the dismissal of Doe Defendants.
The Court grants and dismisses defendants Does 1 - 10 inclusive.

Counsel confirms with the Court that the request for judgment shall resolve the entire case.

Good cause appearing, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven its prima facie case and rules in favor of the Plaintiff.

The Court reviews the proposed judgment with Counsel and cites issues. The Court denies 17.50% interest. Counsel to compute interest at 10%.

Plaintiff's Counsel is to prepare one (1) proposed judgment as discussed on a judicial council form to be submitted for review and approval of the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2024 Continued To Feb-19-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
